metadata.title: Hungry Like the Wolf
metadata.lyrics:
[00:08.92] Darken the city, night is a wire
[00:12.71] Steam in the subway, earth is afire (do-do-do-do-do-do-do-do-do)
[00:24.19] Woman, you want me, give me a sign
[00:27.91] And catch my breathing even closer behind (do-do-do-do-do-do-do-do-do)
[00:35.25] 
[00:39.73] In touch with the ground
[00:41.77] I'm on the hunt, I'm after you
[00:45.35] Smell like I sound, I'm lost in a crowd
[00:49.12] And I'm hungry like the wolf
[00:52.92] Straddle the line in discord and rhyme
[00:56.88] I'm on the hunt, I'm after you
[01:00.59] Mouth is alive, with juices like wine
[01:04.20] And I'm hungry like the wolf
[01:10.46] 
[01:12.94] Stalked in the forest, too close to hide
[01:16.96] I'll be upon you by the moonlight side (do-do-do-do-do-do-do-do-do)
[01:28.16] High blood drumming on your skin, it's so tight
[01:31.99] You feel my heat, I'm just a moment behind (do-do-do-do-do-do-do-do-do)
[01:40.77] 
[01:43.72] In touch with the ground
[01:45.88] I'm on the hunt I'm after you
[01:49.58] A scent and a sound, I'm lost and I'm found
[01:53.16] And I'm hungry like the wolf
[01:57.03] Strut on a line, it's discord and rhyme
[02:00.63] I howl and I whine, I'm after you
[02:04.64] Mouth is alive, all running inside
[02:08.27] And I'm hungry like the wolf
[02:11.75] Hungry like the wolf
[02:24.79] Hungry like the wolf
[02:25.38] Hungry like the wolf
[02:31.13] Burning the ground, I break from the crowd
[02:34.86] I'm on the hunt, I'm after you
[02:38.30] I smell like I sound, I'm lost and I'm found
[02:42.17] And I'm hungry like the wolf
[02:46.08] Strut on a line, it's discord and rhyme
[02:49.91] I'm on the hunt, I'm after you
[02:53.67] Mouth is alive, with juices like wine
[02:57.30] And I'm hungry like the wolf
[03:01.25] Burning the ground, I break from the crowd
[03:05.04] I'm on the hunt, I'm after you
